title: [InstCombine][profcheck] Fix missing branch data in InstCombineCompares.cpp
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-select.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-select.ll
index c29527a3c3c5e..4b24f423841f0 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-select.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-select.ll
@@ -1,10 +1,13 @@
-; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py
+; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py UTC_ARGS: --check-globals
 ; RUN: opt -S -passes=instcombine < %s | FileCheck %s
 
 declare void @use(i8)
 declare void @use.i1(i1)
 declare i8 @llvm.umin.i8(i8, i8)
 
+;.
+; CHECK: @g = external global i8
+;.
 define i1 @icmp_select_const(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_select_const(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP1:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[X:%.*]], 0
@@ -46,18 +49,18 @@ define i1 @icmp_select_var_commuted(i8 %x, i8 %y, i8 %_z) {
   ret i1 %cmp2
 }
 
-define i1 @icmp_select_var_select(i8 %x, i8 %y, i1 %c) {
+define i1 @icmp_select_var_select(i8 %x, i8 %y, i1 %c) !prof !0 {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_select_var_select(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP1:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[X:%.*]], 0
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP212:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[X]], [[Y:%.*]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_C:%.*]] = xor i1 [[C:%.*]], true
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i1 true, i1 [[NOT_C]]
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = select i1 [[TMP1]], i1 true, i1 [[CMP212]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i1 true, i1 [[NOT_C]], !prof [[PROF1:![0-9]+]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = select i1 [[TMP1]], i1 true, i1 [[CMP212]], !prof [[PROF2:![0-9]+]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[CMP2]]
 ;
-  %z = select i1 %c, i8 %x, i8 %y
+  %z = select i1 %c, i8 %x, i8 %y, !prof !1
   %cmp1 = icmp eq i8 %x, 0
-  %sel = select i1 %cmp1, i8 %z, i8 %y
+  %sel = select i1 %cmp1, i8 %z, i8 %y, !prof !2
   %cmp2 = icmp eq i8 %z, %sel
   ret i1 %cmp2
 }
@@ -600,23 +603,23 @@ define i1 @icmp_slt_select(i1 %cond, i32 %a, i32 %b) {
   ret i1 %res
 }
 
-define i1 @discr_eq(i8 %a, i8 %b) {
+define i1 @discr_eq(i8 %a, i8 %b) !prof !0 {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: @discr_eq(
 ; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP1:%.*]] = icmp ugt i8 [[A:%.*]], 1
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = icmp ugt i8 [[B:%.*]], 1
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i8 [[A]], i8 3
-; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP2]], i8 [[B]], i8 3
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i8 [[A]], i8 3, !prof [[PROF3:![0-9]+]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP2]], i8 [[B]], i8 3, !prof [[PROF1]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RES:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[TMP0]], [[TMP1]]
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[RES]]
 ;
 entry:
   %add1 = add i8 %a, -2
   %cmp1 = icmp ugt i8 %a, 1
-  %sel1 = select i1 %cmp1, i8 %add1, i8 1
+  %sel1 = select i1 %cmp1, i8 %add1, i8 1, !prof !1
   %add2 = add i8 %b, -2
   %cmp2 = icmp ugt i8 %b, 1
-  %sel2 = select i1 %cmp2, i8 %add2, i8 1
+  %sel2 = select i1 %cmp2, i8 %add2, i8 1, !prof !2
   %res = icmp eq i8 %sel1, %sel2
   ret i1 %res
 }
@@ -952,3 +955,15 @@ end:
   %cmp = icmp eq i32 %sel, 0
   ret i1 %cmp
 }
+
+!0 = !{!"function_entry_count", i64 1000}
+!1 = !{!"branch_weights", i32 2, i32 3}
+!2 = !{!"branch_weights", i32 5, i32 7}
+;.
+; CHECK: attributes #[[ATTR0:[0-9]+]] = { nocallback nocreateundeforpoison nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }
+;.
+; CHECK: [[META0:![0-9]+]] = !{!"function_entry_count", i64 1000}
+; CHECK: [[PROF1]] = !{!"branch_weights", i32 5, i32 7}
+; CHECK: [[PROF2]] = !{!"unknown", !"instcombine"}
+; CHECK: [[PROF3]] = !{!"branch_weights", i32 2, i32 3}
+;.

tests.test_body:
define i1 @discr_eq(i8 %a, i8 %b) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @discr_eq(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP1:%.*]] = icmp ugt i8 [[A:%.*]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = icmp ugt i8 [[B:%.*]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i8 [[A]], i8 3, !prof [[PROF3:![0-9]+]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP2]], i8 [[B]], i8 3, !prof [[PROF1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RES:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[TMP0]], [[TMP1]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[RES]]
entry:
  %add1 = add i8 %a, -2
  %cmp1 = icmp ugt i8 %a, 1
  %sel1 = select i1 %cmp1, i8 %add1, i8 1, !prof !1
  %add2 = add i8 %b, -2
  %cmp2 = icmp ugt i8 %b, 1
  %sel2 = select i1 %cmp2, i8 %add2, i8 1, !prof !2
  %res = icmp eq i8 %sel1, %sel2
  ret i1 %res
}
tests.source_program:
define i1 @discr_eq(i8 %a, i8 %b) !prof !0 {
entry:
  %add1 = add i8 %a, -2
  %cmp1 = icmp ugt i8 %a, 1
  %sel1 = select i1 %cmp1, i8 %add1, i8 1, !prof !1
  %add2 = add i8 %b, -2
  %cmp2 = icmp ugt i8 %b, 1
  %sel2 = select i1 %cmp2, i8 %add2, i8 1, !prof !2
  %res = icmp eq i8 %sel1, %sel2
  ret i1 %res
}

tests.test_body:
define i1 @icmp_select_const(i8 %x, i8 %y) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_select_const(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP1:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[X:%.*]], 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP21:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[Y:%.*]], 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i1 true, i1 [[CMP21]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[CMP2]]
  %cmp1 = icmp eq i8 %x, 0
  %sel = select i1 %cmp1, i8 0, i8 %y
  %cmp2 = icmp eq i8 %sel, 0
  ret i1 %cmp2
}

define i1 @icmp_select_var_commuted(i8 %x, i8 %y, i8 %_z) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_select_var_commuted(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[Z:%.*]] = udiv i8 42, [[_Z:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP1:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[X:%.*]], 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP21:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[Y:%.*]], [[Z]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i1 true, i1 [[CMP21]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[CMP2]]
  %z = udiv i8 42, %_z
  %cmp1 = icmp eq i8 %x, 0
  %sel = select i1 %cmp1, i8 %z, i8 %y
  %cmp2 = icmp eq i8 %z, %sel
  ret i1 %cmp2
}
tests.source_program:
define i1 @icmp_select_var_commuted(i8 %x, i8 %y, i8 %_z) {
  %z = udiv i8 42, %_z
  %cmp1 = icmp eq i8 %x, 0
  %sel = select i1 %cmp1, i8 %z, i8 %y
  %cmp2 = icmp eq i8 %z, %sel
  ret i1 %cmp2
}

tests.test_body:
define i1 @icmp_select_var_select(i8 %x, i8 %y, i1 %c) !prof !0 {
; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_select_var_select(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP1:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[X:%.*]], 0
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP212:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[X]], [[Y:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_C:%.*]] = xor i1 [[C:%.*]], true
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = select i1 [[CMP1]], i1 true, i1 [[NOT_C]], !prof [[PROF1:![0-9]+]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = select i1 [[TMP1]], i1 true, i1 [[CMP212]], !prof [[PROF2:![0-9]+]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[CMP2]]
  %z = select i1 %c, i8 %x, i8 %y, !prof !1
  %cmp1 = icmp eq i8 %x, 0
  %sel = select i1 %cmp1, i8 %z, i8 %y, !prof !2
  %cmp2 = icmp eq i8 %z, %sel
  ret i1 %cmp2
}
tests.source_program:
define i1 @icmp_select_var_select(i8 %x, i8 %y, i1 %c) !prof !0 {
  %z = select i1 %c, i8 %x, i8 %y, !prof !1
  %cmp1 = icmp eq i8 %x, 0
  %sel = select i1 %cmp1, i8 %z, i8 %y, !prof !2
  %cmp2 = icmp eq i8 %z, %sel
  ret i1 %cmp2
}

tests.test_body:
define i1 @icmp_slt_select(i1 %cond, i32 %a, i32 %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_slt_select(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LHS:%.*]] = select i1 [[COND:%.*]], i32 [[A:%.*]], i32 [[B:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RHS:%.*]] = select i1 [[COND]], i32 [[B]], i32 [[A]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RES:%.*]] = icmp slt i32 [[LHS]], [[RHS]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[RES]]
  %lhs = select i1 %cond, i32 %a, i32 %b
  %rhs = select i1 %cond, i32 %b, i32 %a
  %res = icmp slt i32 %lhs, %rhs
  ret i1 %res
}
